sections.title: Speaking to the male gnome traveller

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there! What're you doing in the city?

lines.speaker: Gnome traveller (male)
lines.text: Why do you want to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just wondering, I thought this was a dwarven city, not a gnome city.

lines.speaker: Gnome traveller (male)
lines.text: It's not a human city either, but you're here all the same.

lines.speaker: Gnome traveller (male)
lines.text: Anyway, we're here to do some business with one of the companies of the Consortium. Getting supplies for our people back at, er, the Grand Tree.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What kind of special supplies do the dwarves have that you need then?

lines.speaker: Gnome traveller (male)
lines.text: Oh, nothing special, nothing special I assure you... it's just that the dwarves have everything in large supplies.

sections.title: Speaking to the female gnome traveller

lines.speaker: Gnome traveller (female)
lines.text: Miss gnome to you, thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry about that... So what are you doing in fair Keldagrim?

lines.speaker: Gnome traveller (female)
lines.text: We are the companions of the leader of our expedition. We have come here to bargain for much needed supplies for our people.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yes, where are you from?

lines.speaker: Gnome traveller (female)
lines.text: Oh yes, sorry, that's what I meant to say.
